hero.title: Built for Amazon Operators
hero.subtitle: Manage purchasing, profit tracking, and warehouse operations in one unified platform.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: SyncroSale enables you to manage your store inventory quickly and efficiently. With advanced filtering, you can easily list products by brand, category, price, and stock range. Perform bulk actions to manage products at scale, remove items from specific categories, or organize them into custom lists. Set pricing and stock rules to automate your workflows. Access all product details — including images, titles, prices, stock, and brand — from a single dashboard.

search.title: Advanced Search Console
search.description: Find the products you need in seconds with SyncroSale’s user-friendly search console. Narrow down results using detailed filters and quickly identify the right products. Gain insights through stock levels, performance metrics, and trends. With order-based filtering and smart notifications, you can instantly detect and process incoming orders without missing anything.

orders.title: Order Tracking
orders.description: SyncroSale allows you to track every order end-to-end. Instantly see when an order is delivered or returned for any reason. The system automatically detects failed deliveries and notifies you, ensuring full control over your operations. Delivery times are recorded, and optional notifications keep you updated at every stage.

upload.title: Product Upload Automation
upload.description: Automate your product listing process with SyncroSale. Add products directly to your store without downloading or uploading files. Products are processed within the system, optimized based on your pricing and stock rules, and pushed to your store ready for sale. All operations are handled via API integration, saving time and reducing manual work.

cta.subtitle: Join early users and automate your Amazon operations.
